Genderfluid So. I've learned a thing about myself. I'm genderfluid. And on male days I really want people to perceive me as male but I also want to wear feminine clothes. I'm cool with being called she AFTER you meet me but I want you to look at me and automatically think I'm a guy. On guy days that is. On girl days I couldn't care less. I think this is because I'm AFAB so I've already had people validate those feeling time and time again. On the no gender days I get dysphoria from feminine clothes. I have yet to experience a both gender, that I remember, I just recently realized I'm genderfluid. Any tips on what to do on guy days to look like a guy but dress feminine. I hate being seen as a girl on guy days.

How can I see a doctor about if I really do have Gender Dysphoria without my parents knowing I'm 16 with very religious parents, I know that I wanna be a girl and I constantly imagine and dream about it and secretly cross dress a lot. Only 4 of my closest friends know and I'm scared to tell my parents but I also want to get closure on this. Please help if you can
